subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! It hath been some time since I have conversed with that kind friend or expressed my sentiments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و پیمان مدتیست که با آن یار مهربان گفتگوای ننمودم و از احساسات
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
